violations.description: Test timeout increased to 15s for database cleanup
violations.suggestion: Optimize cleanup queries or use transaction rollback
violations.code_snippet: }, 15000) // Increase timeout to 15s for database cleanup

violations.description: cleanupTestData() runs before EACH test - deletes all records
violations.suggestion: Use transaction rollback or test-scoped cleanup instead
Use vi.useFakeTimers() to eliminate wait time

violations.description: Tests use setTimeout(150ms) - adds delay to test execution

recommendations: Use transaction rollback instead of DELETE for faster cleanup
Use vi.useFakeTimers() to eliminate setTimeout delays
Remove beforeEach cleanupTestData() - use test-scoped data instead
All tests are parallelizable - consider test.describe.configure({ mode: 'parallel' })
summary: Good performance with 4 violations (0 HIGH). Main issue is slow database cleanup (15s). 95% of tests can run in parallel.
